Name: Snow
Description: Controls procedural snow surface rendering, including texture mapping, accumulation, surface response, and visual properties such as sparkle, reflectance, and normal detail.

Fields.Name: Texture ID
Fields.Description: Identifier for the snow texture used for surface appearance and detail mapping.

Fields.Name: Angle
Fields.Description: Orientation angle of snow accumulation or texture projection direction.

Fields.Name: Tiling Scale
Fields.Description: Controls how frequently the snow texture repeats across surfaces.

Fields.ID: Snow Scene Snow Rate Detail Info
Fields.Name: Scene Snow Rate
Fields.Description: Intensity of snowfall accumulation affecting how quickly snow builds up in the scene.

Fields.Name: Sparkle Tiling Scale
Fields.Description: Controls tiling frequency of sparkly highlights or icy glints on snow surfaces.

Fields.ID: Snow Ground Plane Height Detail Info
Fields.Name: Ground Plane Height
Fields.Description: Defines the base height of the ground plane where snow accumulation is applied.

Fields.Name: Plane Height
Fields.Description: Overall height offset of the snow surface above geometry.

Fields.Name: Normal Scale
Fields.Description: Strength of normal map detail affecting perceived surface roughness of snow.

Fields.Name: Normal Blur Radius
Fields.Description: Radius used to smooth normal map details, softening sharp surface variations.

Fields.Name: Albedo Scale
Fields.Description: RGBA scaling applied to snow base color for tinting and brightness adjustment.

Fields.Name: Reflectance
Fields.Description: Controls how reflective the snow surface is, affecting icy or matte appearance.
